pages.title: Push It On Me
pages.tagline: Dive into the smoky, seductive world of 'Push It On Me'.

pages.body: Step inside a late-night French Touch sanctuary where intimacy and desire take center stage. This track captures the sultry atmosphere of a dimly lit club, driven by warm analog basslines that pulse beneath filtered disco loops. Sultry female vocals, chopped into hypnotic fragments, guide you through a journey from whispered anticipation to full surrender in the drop. The music wraps around you like smoke, inviting you to keep the feeling alive while side-chained pads swell and fall. It is an invitation to lose yourself in the rhythm of the night.
pages.styleSentence: A moody French touch deep house track at 123 BPM featuring a filtered disco loop and warm analog bassline that drives an intimate late-night vibe, underscored by side-chained pads and glitched female vocal chops.

pages.text:
[Intro - filtered, distant vocal]
feel it... feel it... (feel-feel-feel it)

[Verse]
low lights, slow move, bodies in the dark
nobody's watchin', give in to the spark

[Hook - chopped & repeated]
push it on me (push-push-push it on me)
keep the feeling, keep the feeling on
(on-on-on)

[Drop - vocal stutter over bass]
feel-feel-feel... it on
feel-feel-feel... it on

[Breakdown - whispered]
don't stop now... keep it slow

[Hook]
push it on me (push-push-push it on me)

pages.vocalStyle: sultry female vocals with chopped/glitched hooks

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Whispers secrets through glitched hooks that never fade away.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking with relentless, hypnotic rhythms.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Drives the intimate vibe like a warm analog heartbeat.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Weaves side-chained pads into layers of sultry atmosphere.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Adds atmospheric depth to every shadow and silence.
